title: Filipino-Style Crispy Chicken Salad
description: A twist on the classic chicken salad recipe, this Filipino-inspired dish combines crispy fried chicken with fresh avocado and crunchy salad. A perfect fusion of flavors and textures.

ingredients.name: mixed greens salad
ingredients.notes: such as romaine, arugula, and red leaf lettuce

instructions: In a large bowl, mix together chicken pieces, breadcrumbs, and fried chicken seasoning.
Heat about 1/2-inch of oil in a deep frying pan over medium-high heat.
Fry chicken pieces until golden brown and crispy, about 5-7 minutes.
Drain excess oil on paper towels.
In a separate bowl, mix together diced avocado and mixed greens salad.
To assemble the salad, place a bed of mixed greens on a plate, followed by crispy fried chicken pieces.
Top with diced avocado and serve immediately.
